project_type: Multi-tenant Fastify backend (Node.js 22) + vanilla JS single-page frontend (qi-webapp)
build_system: npm with prisma generate + tsc; strict TS config (exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, verbatimModuleSyntax)
test_framework: Node built-in test runner (node:test) with tsx loader; integration tests use app.inject() against real Postgres
verification_instructions: 1) Start Postgres: docker run -d --name qi-pg -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=qi -e POSTGRES_USER=qi -e POSTGRES_DB=qi_platform -p 5432:5432 postgres:16-alpine; 2) Run prisma migrate deploy; 3) npm run build; 4) npm test
snapshot_or_generated_files: server/dist/ is the tsc output and prisma client at node_modules/.prisma/client. Neither is checked in.
setup_instructions: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Docker available. PostgreSQL needed for tests. Node 22 pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, no `any` types. All routes enforce tenant isolation at query layer. Error messages remain generic. Session cookie auth. Soft-delete via deletedAt pattern.
key_patterns: Route pattern: Fastify plugin function exported as default, zod schemas for validation, authenticate hook + requireRole factory. Test pattern: node:test describe/test/before/after, buildTestApp() helper, registerUser(), cleanDatabase() via TRUNCATE. Frontend: IIFE module pattern on window.QIAPI / window.QIStore.
directory_structure: server/src/auth/ (password, session, totp, routes); server/src/routes/ (cases.ts); server/src/middleware/ (rbac.ts); server/test/ (helpers.ts, auth.test.ts, cases.test.ts); server/prisma/ (schema.prisma, migrations/); qi-webapp/js/ (api.js, store.js, ui.js, calc.js)
